what_it_does: Defines a 24 by 24 SVG icon showing a parent box connected to two child boxes in a decision-tree layout.
observations: The root svg uses viewBox 0 0 24 24 with width and height set to 24.
The icon has no fill and uses stroke="currentColor" so it inherits the surrounding color.
Three small rounded rectangles represent one top node and two lower branch nodes.
A single path draws the vertical trunk and horizontal branch connectors.
Stroke styling uses width 1.5 with round line caps and round line joins.
standouts: The drawing is built only from rect and path primitives.
The geometry reads as a compact decision-tree diagram with one parent and two outcomes.
conventions: Follows a common 24x24 stroked icon convention.
Keeps the SVG self-contained with no ids, classes, scripts, or external references.
notes: A small reusable line icon for representing branching decisions or tree logic.
purpose_vs_actual: The file name indicates a decision-tree icon, and the SVG content renders that concept.
intention_signals: It appears intended to provide a simple, color-inheriting interface icon for decision-tree or branching-flow actions.
contribution: A compact stroke-based decision-tree glyph with inherited color, fixed 24px sizing, and simple SVG primitives.
summary_for_embedding: This is a 24x24 currentColor SVG line icon depicting a decision tree with one top node branching to two lower nodes.
intention_for_embedding: It was made to visually represent branching decisions, tree logic, or flow outcomes in an interface icon set.
